nodes.label: after-login-desktop.png
nodes.description: Desktop screenshot (1440x1000) of the LICI platform after login, showing the internal dashboard ApplicationShell with sidebar navigation, LICI branding, and main content area. Part of UX validation evidence demonstrating the unified visual system post-migration.

nodes.label: Desktop Dashboard View
nodes.description: 1440x1000 desktop layout pattern showing sidebar + content shell with LICI green branding, grouped navigation, user avatar with initials, and the Resumen (dashboard) page as default post-login view.
